project.title: Interactions between basic helix-loop-helix transcription factors and nucleosomes
project.projectDescription: In solution crosslinking mass spectrometry of transcription factors in complex with nucleosomes
project.sampleProcessingProtocol: DSSO-based crosslinking of recombinant proteins and measurement by MS2/MS3 on a Thermo instrument as described in Michael et al.
project.dataProcessingProtocol: XlinkX/Proteome Discoverer analysis using the default settings for crosslinking-MS as described in Michael et al.
keywords: Dsso crosslinking xlinkx pd transcription factor nucleosome human
